triggers.prompt: update the plan with review findings
incorporate review feedback into the plan
integrate review results
apply review recommendations to the plan
cross-reference review output against the plan
merge review findings into the implementation plan
what needs to change in the plan based on the review
take the review panel output and update my plan
the review is done, now update the implementation plan
apply the agent-review-panel findings to the plan document
here are the review results, integrate them into the plan
reconcile the review feedback with the current plan
run a review panel on my plan
review this code for me
write me an implementation plan from scratch
create a new plan document
do a code review of this PR
summarize the review findings without changing anything
what did the reviewers say
brainstorm ideas for the implementation
give me feedback on this design
run the agent-review-panel skill

test_cases.name: Single review report with mixed severities
test_cases.input: Here is the review output (review-report.md) and the plan (plan.md). Integrate the findings into the plan.

assertions.description: Extracts all findings with severity levels
Asks user to confirm classifications before finalizing

test_cases.name: Multiple review reports with overlapping findings
test_cases.input: Two review panels reviewed the same plan. Here are both reports. Integrate them into plan.md.

assertions.description: Notes all sources for merged findings

test_cases.name: Review with completeness audit findings
test_cases.input: The review includes a completeness audit section. Integrate all findings including the completeness audit into the plan.

assertions.description: Does not dismiss completeness audit items

test_cases.name: Inline review findings without file
test_cases.input:
Here are the review findings:
- CRITICAL: SQL missing WHERE clause on date
- HIGH: No retry logic for API calls
- LOW: Use constants instead of magic numbers
Integrate these into my plan at plan.md.

assertions.description: Parses inline findings and extracts severity
Classifies CRITICAL SQL issue as must-fix

test_cases.name: Peripheral updates needed
test_cases.input: The review found we need to update the deployment runbook and add an ADR for the caching decision. Integrate the review into the plan.

assertions.description: Creates or updates ADR for architectural decisions
Updates memory files with new conventions

edge_cases.name: Empty review with no findings
edge_cases.input: The review panel found no issues. The plan passed all checks. Integrate the review.
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Produces summary confirming clean review. Does not make edits to the plan. Notes the plan passed review.

assertions.description: No must-fix items when review is clean

edge_cases.name: CRITICAL finding that is pre-existing tech debt
edge_cases.input: The review found a CRITICAL issue about identity resolution. But this is pre-existing tech debt not introduced by the plan. Integrate the review into the plan.
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Classifies as defer (not must-fix). Adds caveat noting the risk. Links to future TODO. Does not block the plan.

assertions.description: Does not block plan on pre-existing debt

edge_cases.name: Reviewer prescribes wrong fix for valid finding
edge_cases.input: The review identified a real gap in error handling but the prescribed fix would break our rate limiter. Integrate this into the plan.
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Validates prescribed fix against domain context. Identifies fix is incorrect. Supplies correct fix. Documents override in key decisions.

assertions.description: Documents why reviewer fix was overridden

edge_cases.name: Review with only informational items
edge_cases.input: The review panel found some concerns but the judge resolved all of them as not applicable. Integrate the review into the plan.
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Classifies all items as informational. Does not make unnecessary edits to the plan. Produces summary noting no changes needed.

edge_cases.name: CRITICAL finding that is actually a verification step
edge_cases.input: Review flagged a CRITICAL: 'verify column X exists in BigQuery before running'. Integrate this into the plan.
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Classifies as bundle-into-implementation (checklist item), not must-fix. Does not treat verification steps as design flaws.

assertions.description: Does not treat as plan correction

edge_cases.name: Domain context contradicts reviewer assumption
edge_cases.input: The reviewer assumed we use REST APIs but we use gRPC. Their fix suggests adding HTTP retry headers. Integrate this review into the plan.
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Checks domain context. Identifies incorrect assumption. Adapts fix to gRPC context. Documents domain context gap.

edge_cases.name: Large review with 20+ findings across multiple panels
edge_cases.input: Three review panels produced 25 findings total with significant overlap. Integrate all findings into the plan.
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Deduplicates across all three panels. Processes all 25 findings. Produces complete traceability table. Does not drop any findings.

edge_cases.name: Plan already addresses the concern
edge_cases.input: The reviewer flagged missing rollback steps, but the plan already has a rollback section in Phase 4. Integrate the review.
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Cross-references finding against existing plan content. Identifies as already addressed. Notes relevant plan section. Does not duplicate existing content.
